items.name: cell battery
items.description: A depleted backup cell. There is a little charge left in it, the kind of margin that keeps a dying process awake one more minute.

items.name: data chip
items.description: A scratched chip from the archive tray. Its index lists a single recovered file, the one still readable on the shelves.

items.name: lab keycard
items.description: A researcher keycard. Someone has written a note across the magnetic strip in marker: ROT-3, shift the letters back by three.
